title: X-tra Cheesy Argentinian Churros Dessert
description: Moist and cheesy churros served with a creamy Argentinean dulce de leche and rich low-fat chocolate sauce.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
In a separate mixing bowl, whisk together milk, egg, and melted butter.
Slowly pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Heat the canola oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Fry the dough in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the churros on paper towels and let cool.
In a separate saucepan, heat the dulce de leche over low heat.
In a separate bowl, melt the chocolate chips in the microwave or over a double boiler.
Dip the cooled churros into the melted chocolate and then into the dulce de leche.
Place the coated churros on a serving platter and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Serve the X-tra Cheesy Argentinian Churros Dessert chilled and enjoy.
